name: deploy_html_app
description: Deploys an HTML application to the PASOE ROOT web directory at C:\progress\OE128_64_WRK\oepas1\webapps\ROOT. Provide a subfolder name (e.g. 'myapp') and the full HTML content as a string. The tool writes the content as index.html inside that subfolder, creating the folder if needed. Returns the public URL path where the app can be accessed.

app_name.description: Subfolder name for the app, e.g. 'myapp'. Use a single word or hyphenated name, no spaces.

html_content.description: Full HTML content to write as index.html in the app subfolder.

filename.description: Optional filename to use instead of index.html, e.g. 'dashboard.html'.
